name: claude-legal-immigration-laws
description: Shared reference corpus for U.S. immigration law. Snapshots the canonical rules verbatim — the Immigration and Nationality Act (INA, 8 U.S.C. Chapter 12), the immigration regulations in 8 CFR (DHS/USCIS/CBP/ICE chapter I plus the DOJ/EOIR immigration-court and Board of Immigration Appeals chapter V at 8 CFR 1001-1337), and the State Department visa/passport/exchange parts of 22 CFR — and indexes the immigration case-law sources for on-demand lookup: the federal circuit courts (petitions for review of removal orders under INA Sec. 242 / 8 U.S.C. Sec. 1252, via CourtListener and the connected CourtListener MCP), the Board of Immigration Appeals precedent decisions (I&N Dec., via the EOIR Virtual Law Library), and the USCIS Administrative Appeals Office (AAO) decisions. The Foreign Affairs Manual (FAM) ships as canonical-URL pointer stubs because fam.state.gov serves an incomplete TLS certificate chain that the sandbox's TLS-inspecting egress proxy can't verify (HTTP 503) — an egress/cert-chain issue, not bot-gating. This is a sources/reference plugin (no drafting skills yet): statutes and regulations are mirrored as Markdown by scripts/pull_ina.py and scripts/pull_immigration_cfr.py; FAM by scripts/pull_fam.py; case law stays on-demand per legal-data-apis.md and online-sources.md.
